content.principles: 1. String: SDS (Simple Dynamic String). 2. Hash: ziplist/listpack + hashtable. 3. List: quicklist (linkedlist of ziplists). 4. Set: intset + hashtable. 5. ZSet: ziplist/listpack + skiplist. Redis 7 uses listpack to replace ziplist.
content.pitfalls: Big keys leading to blocking. Ziplist/listpack conversion to hashtable/skiplist is one-way (usually). Memory fragmentation in jemalloc.
follow_up_paths: Why SkipList instead of Red-Black Tree?
